news.headline: Novo Nordisk's denecimig (Mim8) shows positive long-term hemophilia A data at ISTH 2026
news.summary: The FRONTIER4 long-term extension study showed roughly 71% of adults/adolescents and 89% of children had zero treated bleeds across flexible weekly, biweekly, and monthly denecimig dosing. The data support Novo's hemophilia A pipeline as the FVIIIa-mimetic antibody remains under FDA review.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk halts CagriSema single-chamber device study
news.summary: Novo Nordisk withdrew a clinical study comparing injection device versions for CagriSema, but CEO Mike Doustdar said there is "no change in plan" for the obesity drug's launch timeline. The move follows CagriSema's earlier underwhelming head-to-head weight-loss showing versus Eli Lilly's tirzepatide.

news.headline: Medicare GLP-1 Bridge program launches, cutting Wegovy cost to $50 a month for eligible seniors
news.summary: The CMS-backed Medicare GLP-1 Bridge program went live nationwide on July 1, giving eligible Medicare beneficiaries access to Wegovy injections and the Wegovy pill for a $50 monthly copay through 2027. The program materially expands Novo Nordisk's addressable obesity-drug market among seniors.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk CEO looks beyond weight loss to longevity, aesthetics
news.summary: CEO Mike Doustdar said Novo Nordisk is looking to extend its GLP-1 franchise into longevity research and aesthetic medicine as it searches for new growth avenues beyond core diabetes and obesity care.

news.headline: Wegovy pill prescriptions surpass 3 million in the US
news.summary: Novo Nordisk said its oral semaglutide (Wegovy pill) surpassed 3 million US prescriptions just over five months after launch, with more than 80% going to patients new to GLP-1 therapy. The milestone was announced alongside new pipeline data at the ADA 2026 Scientific Sessions.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk presents CagriSema and zenagamtide (amycretin) pipeline data at ADA 2026
news.summary: At the ADA Scientific Sessions, Novo presented REIMAGINE trial data showing CagriSema achieved superior HbA1c reduction and weight loss versus semaglutide in type 2 diabetes, alongside positive phase 2b data for next-generation dual agonist zenagamtide (amycretin).

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings
catalysts.detail: Novo Nordisk reports second-quarter 2026 financial results before market open, the next major test of whether the Wegovy pill and Medicare GLP-1 Bridge access are reaccelerating growth.

catalysts.label: FDA decision on CagriSema NDA
catalysts.detail: FDA decision expected on the New Drug Application for CagriSema (cagrilintide/semaglutide) for chronic weight management, filed December 2025.

catalysts.label: FDA decision on denecimig BLA
catalysts.detail: FDA review of the Biologics License Application for denecimig (Mim8), a next-generation hemophilia A prophylaxis, following BLA submission in September 2025.

catalysts.label: Phase 3 program start for zenagamtide (amycretin) in type 2 diabetes
catalysts.detail: Novo Nordisk plans to initiate a pivotal phase 3 program for dual amylin/GLP-1 candidate zenagamtide in type 2 diabetes following positive phase 2b data at ADA 2026.

catalysts.label: First ex-US launches of the Wegovy pill
catalysts.detail: Novo Nordisk plans the first launches of the oral Wegovy (semaglutide) pill outside the US in the second half of 2026, following recent approval in the UAE.

pulse: Novo Nordisk remains under competitive pressure from Eli Lilly's tirzepatide franchise, underscored by CagriSema's underwhelming head-to-head weight-loss result and the recent withdrawal of a CagriSema device study, even as management insists the launch timeline is unchanged. Offsetting this, the oral Wegovy pill has crossed 3 million US prescriptions, Medicare's new GLP-1 Bridge program (live since July 1) is expanding access for seniors, and ADA/ISTH 2026 data readouts gave incremental reassurance on the broader diabetes, obesity, and hemophilia pipeline (CagriSema, zenagamtide/amycretin, denecimig). Q2 2026 earnings on August 5 will be the next key signal of whether these pipeline and access catalysts are translating into a growth reacceleration.
